sqlMap.select: /*DialogManageCloseHis.selectManageCloseHisList*/ SELECT T.FIS_YEAR , T.BGT_DGR , T.HIS_SEQ , T.CLOSE_YN , T.ATCH_FILE_ID , TO_CHAR(T.CLOSE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CLOSE_DATE , TO_CHAR(T.CLOSE_CANCEL_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CLOSE_CANCEL_DATE , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 1) AS FILE_SN0 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 1) AS FILE_SN1 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 2) AS FILE_SN2 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 3) AS FILE_SN3 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 110) AS FILE_SN110 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 120) AS FILE_SN120 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 130) AS FILE_SN130 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 140) AS FILE_SN140 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 150) AS FILE_SN150 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 155) AS FILE_SN155 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 160) AS FILE_SN160 , (SELECT Z.FILE_SN FROM TB_FILE_DETL Z WHERE Z.ATCH_FILE_ID = T.ATCH_FILE_ID AND Z.FILE_SN = 190) AS FILE_SN190 , '' AS HIS_VIEW FROM TB_BGTDGRCLOSE_H T WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND T.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# ORDER BY T.HIS_SEQ
